response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON was partially utilized for the songs performed ('Feeling Gradation', 'Buddies', and 'Okey Dokey').
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for identifying the song segments and names, while the talk segments were manually transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize precisely with each speaker's lines, adjusting for rapid-fire talk and the transition between singing and speaking.

subtitles.original: 楽しい時間はあっという間！そう！みんなとのライブだ！
subtitles.english: Time flew by so fast when we were having fun! Yes! It's our live show with everyone!

subtitles.original: いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: そう、かけがえないメモリーズ　握りしめりゃポジティブ
subtitles.english: Yes, if I hold onto these irreplaceable memories, I'll stay positive.

subtitles.original: 運命　強気で行こう
subtitles.english: Let's face our destiny with confidence.

subtitles.original: 全然平気って　言っとくね　あ、痛っ！
subtitles.english: I'll tell you I'm totally fine—ah, ouch!

subtitles.original: 立ち上がれるエンパシー
subtitles.english: Empathy that lets us rise up,

subtitles.original: たまに目立つ傷は...
subtitles.english: and the occasionally noticeable scars are...

subtitles.original: Reach to the top, yeah!
subtitles.english: Reach to the top, yeah!

subtitles.original: 絶対　絶対　絶対　絶対的な切符をチョイス
subtitles.english: Absolutely, absolutely, absolutely, choosing the ultimate ticket.

subtitles.original: 今はもう自由気ままのミズイラズ
subtitles.english: Now it's just us, free and easy.

subtitles.original: Rollin' Rollin' Rollin' ロールしていくドロップス
subtitles.english: Rollin' Rollin' Rollin', rolling like drops.

subtitles.original: 限界突破に　ひきつけろミラクル
subtitles.english: Break past your limits and attract a miracle!

subtitles.original: Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, 予想最高のDays
subtitles.english: Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, the best days I imagined,

subtitles.original: Easy Breezy, 大体いつでもFavorite
subtitles.english: Easy Breezy, pretty much always our favorite.

subtitles.original: Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, このままでいいよね
subtitles.english: Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, in this moment, let's go,

subtitles.original: Easy Breezy, 踊ろうよ Everybody
subtitles.english: Easy Breezy, let's dance, everybody!

subtitles.original: ReGLOSS 1st Live、
subtitles.english: ReGLOSS 1st Live,

subtitles.original: Flash×Pointへようこそ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to Flash Point!

subtitles.original: いつもの挨拶から行きましょう！
subtitles.english: Let's start with our usual greeting!

subtitles.original: Reach to the top, we are...
subtitles.english: Reach to the top, we are...

subtitles.original: ReGLOSS!
subtitles.english: ReGLOSS!

subtitles.original: では、さっそく自己紹介からしていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Now, let's get right into our self-introductions!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい！奏からやりたい！奏からやる！
subtitles.english: Yes yes yes! I want to go first! Kanade will start!

subtitles.original: どうぞどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Go ahead, go ahead!

subtitles.original: はーい！お待たせしました！みんなのアイドル、ちびっこ歌姫、音乃瀬奏こと、
subtitles.english: Hi! Thanks for waiting! Everyone's idol, the tiny diva, Otonose Kanade,

subtitles.original: たまごトーストだーい好き、音乃瀬奏です！
subtitles.english: and major lover of egg toast, is here!

subtitles.original: みんな、会いに来てくれて、黄色にしてくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you all for coming to see me and filling the venue with yellow!

subtitles.original: そして！
subtitles.english: And next!

subtitles.original: 可愛い、ポジティブ、ジーニアス、一条莉々華こと、一条莉々華だよ！
subtitles.english: Cute, positive, genius, Ichijou Ririka, also known as Ichijou Ririka, is here!

subtitles.original: やばい、もうみんなの声めっちゃ、この熱気、浴びてる、今！
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I'm totally bathing in everyone's voices and this heat right now!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ嬉しい！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: I'm so incredibly happy! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 最高な気分！そして！
subtitles.english: I feel amazing! And next!

subtitles.original: はい、えー、ホロライブデバイス、ReGLOSSの賑やかしネタ枠担当、重度の活字中毒、学芸員資格を持つ、落語見習い、儒烏風亭らでんでございます！
subtitles.english: Hello! From hololive DEV_IS, ReGLOSS's lively comedic relief, severe reading addict, curator license holder, and rakugo apprentice, Juufuutei Raden!

subtitles.original: 本日もどうぞよろしくお願い申し上げます。
subtitles.english: I look forward to today, thank you very much.

subtitles.original: 最後は！
subtitles.english: And last!

subtitles.original: はい、ぷんぷんぷん！降って湧いたマイナスイオン、みんなの癒やし担当、轟はじめ、はじめます！
subtitles.english: Hi! Pun-pun-pun! The sudden burst of negative ions, everyone's healer, Todoroki Hajime, is starting!

subtitles.original: みなさん、こんちくわー！
subtitles.english: Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: 紫ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for the purple!

subtitles.original: ついに始まりました、ReGLOSS 1st Live!
subtitles.english: It has finally begun, ReGLOSS 1st Live!

subtitles.original: なんと！
subtitles.english: And what's more...

subtitles.original: 隊長は、欠席...
subtitles.english: The captain is absent...

subtitles.original: 欠席！
subtitles.english: Absent!

subtitles.original: だけど、心は一緒！
subtitles.english: But our hearts are together!

subtitles.original: こんなにたくさんのグロッサーが集まってくれました！
subtitles.english: And so many Grossers have gathered here for us!

subtitles.original: すごい！もう最高な景色です、みなさん本当にありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Amazing! This is the absolute best view. Thank you so much, everyone.

subtitles.original: 思い思いのね、ファッションとかもね...
subtitles.english: Your unique outfits and everything...

subtitles.original: 目で見えてね、ペンライトのグラデーションとか、ちょっとテンションが爆上がりしてしまいましたけれども...
subtitles.english: seeing the gradient of your penlights, my excitement is just through the roof right now...

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございます！今日は最後まで思いっきり楽しんでまいりましょう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Let's have the absolute best time until the very end today!

subtitles.original: そしてね、会場だけじゃなくて、配信もされております！
subtitles.english: And it's not just at the venue, we're also being streamed!

subtitles.original: 配信のみなさんも、楽しんでますか？
subtitles.english: Everyone on stream, are you enjoying it too?

subtitles.original: コメント欄も...
subtitles.english: The comment section too...

subtitles.original: そしてそして！
subtitles.english: And also!

subtitles.original: 韓国ではライブビューイングが実施されています！
subtitles.english: Live viewings are being held in Korea!

subtitles.original: 안녕하세요!
subtitles.english: Annyeonghaseyo!

subtitles.original: 안녕하세요!
subtitles.english: Annyeonghaseyo!

subtitles.original: 라이브 뷰잉으로 보고 계시는 여러분, 재미있게 즐기고 계신가요？
subtitles.english: Everyone watching through the live viewing, are you having fun?

subtitles.original: おー！すごーい！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Amazing!

subtitles.original: やっぱり奏、すごいね！
subtitles.english: As expected of Kanade, you're amazing!

subtitles.original: 当たり前だろ！
subtitles.english: Of course I am!

subtitles.original: はい、えー、ということで、早速ですが、今立っているこのステージではなく、なんと2階からの登場でございましたが、みなさんびっくりした？どうだった？
subtitles.english: Yes! So, to start off, we actually appeared from the second floor instead of this stage we're standing on. Were you surprised? How was it?

subtitles.original: びっくりした！
subtitles.english: I was surprised!

subtitles.original: オープニングから『フィーリングラデーション』、そして『バディーズ』、そして『Okey Dokey』と、3曲続けてお披露目させていただきましたが、みなさんいかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: We performed three songs in a row starting with 'Feeling Gradation', then 'Buddies', and 'Okey Dokey'. How did everyone like it?

subtitles.original: そしてね、みなさんもお気付きかと思いますけれども、今回のライブはバンドメンバーと一緒にお届けしています！
subtitles.english: And as you might have noticed, we're performing today with a live band!

subtitles.original: 普段聴いているあの曲が、どんなアレンジになるのかお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to hearing how the songs you usually listen to will be arranged!

subtitles.original: はい、えー、今日の感想や心に残った瞬間は、ハッシュタグ、リグロス、アンダーバー、ファーストライブでぜひポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Yes! Please post your thoughts on today and your favorite moments using the hashtag #ReGLOSS_1stLive!

subtitles.original: みんなの感想、後で我々見に行きますので、めちゃくちゃ楽しみです！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: We'll be checking everyone's posts later, so we're really looking forward to it! Thank you!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: そしてね、早速ではございますが、次の曲に行きましょうか！
subtitles.english: And now, without further ado, shall we move on to the next song?

subtitles.original: あ、でも待って待って待って待って！
subtitles.english: Ah, but wait wait wait wait!

subtitles.original: YouTubeやTikTokで見てくれているみなさん！
subtitles.english: Everyone watching on YouTube and TikTok!

subtitles.original: ごめんなさい！
subtitles.english: I'm so sorry!
